meta.title: KTV-Picker | Never run out of songs again
meta.description: Import QQ Music playlists or paste song text, then pick the perfect KTV queue with friends.

landing.title: Bring the playlist. We will find the next song.
landing.subtitle: Paste a QQ Music share URL or a messy song list. KTV-Picker normalizes every track for fast swipe picking and room sync.
landing.spotifyExperimental: Spotify public-page import is experimental. If it cannot read tracks, paste the playlist text below.
landing.textPlaceholder:
Blue and White Porcelain - Jay Chou
Later - Rene Liu
landing.loadingBody: Fetching QQ Music, parsing song data, and shaping a swipe deck.
landing.emptyHint: Paste a URL or at least one song line to begin.
landing.timeoutError: Import took too long. Please try again or paste the song text directly.
landing.nextAfterImport: Next: review the preview list, then start picking.
landing.savedProgress: You have saved picker progress from earlier.
landing.selectedCount: {count} selected songs are ready for KTV.

qq.title: QQ Music
qq.body: Import from QQ Music playlist/share links.

spotify.title: Spotify experimental
spotify.body: Try public playlist-page parsing, with manual paste fallback.

manual.title: Manual paste
manual.body: Paste song lines directly when app imports are unavailable.

picker.title: Pick
picker.emptyBody: Paste a QQ Music link or song text on the import page, then come back here to swipe through the deck.
picker.chooseModeTitle: How should we deal the deck?
picker.chooseModeBody: Keep the imported sequence, or shuffle it for surprise KTV energy.
picker.gestureHint: Swipe right or tap Pick to add it to tonight's list. Swipe left or tap Skip to pass for now.
picker.selectionBody: Use this list now, or keep swiping for more options.
picker.selectionLocked: Pick at least one song to open selection mode.
picker.completeBody: You picked {count} songs. Room sync is next so friends can vote together.
picker.allSwiped: All songs in this pass have finished swiping.

auth.loginTitle: Log in to save your KTV history
auth.loginBody: Use a magic link. No password needed. Your imported decks and picks can be saved to your account once Supabase is configured.
auth.sent: Magic link sent. Check your email on this device.
auth.unavailable: Supabase is not configured yet. Guest mode still works.
